title: Privacy policy
lead: How navel.pt processes personal data under the GDPR: controller, purposes, retention, rights and cookies.
introWhoText: José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda., with registered office at Rua Eng.º Abel Ferin Coutinho, Ponta Delgada, São Miguel — Azores, Portugal, tax ID 512012962, share capital EUR 700,000.00, supplies industrial machinery, tools, bearings, compressors and related technical services. This text explains how we process personal data on the website navel.pt.
whyPolicyText: Under Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we explain the general rules applicable to personal data on this site: what data may be collected, why, how long it is kept, your rights and how to exercise them. We aim for lawful, fair and transparent processing.
scopeText: This policy applies to personal data processed by José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda. in connection with navel.pt (public pages, contact form, preferences on your device and the authenticated reserved area). The site may link to third-party websites (manufacturers, suppliers). Those sites have their own policies; we encourage you to read them. We are not responsible for processing carried out by third parties when you visit those destinations.
definitionsText: “Personal data” means information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. “Processing” means any operation or set of operations on such data (e.g. collection, storage, consultation, erasure), with or without automated means.
controllerText: The controller of personal data collected through this site is José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda., with registered office at Rua Eng.º Abel Ferin Coutinho, Ponta Delgada, São Miguel — Azores, Portugal, tax ID 512012962.
dataProtectionContactText: For questions about this policy, our processing or exercising your GDPR rights, please use the contact details in the “Contact” section at the end of this page. Requests are handled by our organisation, without prejudice to your right to complain to the supervisory authority.
dataText: Depending on how you interact with us we mainly process: (i) contact details and message content when you use the contact form (name, email, subject, message); (ii) your email if you ask to join our mailing list via the footer newsletter flow — the request is sent with your email client rather than stored by the site in its own subscription database; (iii) data needed for the reserved area account and session (e.g. registration email, session identifiers managed by Supabase, metadata or files you upload, as configured for that service); (iv) language preference and cookie-banner acceptance stored locally (localStorage). This site does not use audience analytics or behavioural advertising tools (e.g. Google Analytics).
collection: When and how we collect data
collectionText: You provide data when you use the contact form; send a newsletter request email; register or sign in to the reserved area; and when your browser stores the keys listed in the table below. Submitting the form implies consent to processing for replying to your request and involves transmission to our server and email as described.
recipientsText: We do not sell your data. To run the site and reserved area we use providers that process data only as needed: Supabase Inc. (authentication and storage for the reserved area), Google LLC / Google services (font delivery — Google Fonts), and the hosting service where the site and contact PHP script run. They are bound by applicable law and contracts. We may also disclose data to authorities when required by law.
purposeText: We process data to: respond to your contact and information requests (pre-contractual measures or legitimate interest in replying, as applicable); manage the reserved-area account and files you store there (performance of a contract or related pre-contractual relationship); handle mailing-list requests by email where you have consented in that message; comply with legal obligations; store language preference and cookie consent where applicable (consent).
retentionText: We keep data only as long as needed: contact messages for the time needed to respond and for ordinary follow-up; reserved-area account data while the account exists or until you ask for erasure, subject to legal retention; local language and consent keys as stated in the table. After that, data is erased or anonymised where possible.
marketingText: We do not send generic promotional messages without an appropriate legal basis. If you asked to be on a mailing list by email, you may object or unsubscribe at any time using the contact details in the “Contact” section.
rightsText: Under the GDPR you may request access, rectification, erasure (“right to be forgotten”), restriction of processing, data portability where automated processing applies, object to processing in certain cases and withdraw consent where processing is based on it — without affecting lawfulness before withdrawal. You may lodge a complaint with the Portuguese Data Protection Authority (CNPD — www.cnpd.pt). We normally respond within 30 days unless complexity or repetitive requests apply under the law.
complaintsText: Without prejudice to contacting us first, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNPD, the Portuguese supervisory authority for data protection.
securityText: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures, including HTTPS on the site, validation and rate limiting on the contact form, and providers that follow recognized security practices. We recommend an up-to-date browser and operating system and reviewing your device privacy settings.
transfersText: Some providers (e.g. Supabase or Google) may process data on infrastructure outside the European Economic Area. Where that happens we rely on GDPR safeguards such as standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission or other legal mechanisms, as described in those providers’ public documentation.
cookiesIntro: Cookies or similar technologies store information on your device. We mainly use localStorage for preferences (see table) and load fonts from Google servers, which may involve technical communication with Google. You can block or clear storage in your browser; some features may then not work correctly.
cookiesText: Relevant entries are listed below. Supabase authentication may set localStorage keys prefixed “sb-” to keep your session in the reserved area.
cookieRegisterLead: Identifiers and technologies used on this site.
changesText: José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda. may update this policy for legal or operational reasons. The current version is published on this page; please check back periodically.
contactText: To exercise your rights or ask questions: comercial@navel.pt or oficina@navel.pt; phone +351 296 630 120 / +351 296 205 290.
rgpdCrossLead: Dedicated GDPR page with data-subject rights and how to contact us to exercise them.
